setttings.fftsettings: 32 8 64 for descriptors in the tiny analysis window, 256 64 512 for melbands and spectral shape, 256 64 256 for everything else for the short analysis window, and  512 64 1024 for the medium windows (relative to a 44.1k sample rate)
setttings.descriptors: mean of loudness, deriv of loudness, mean of centroid, deriv of centroid, mean of flatness, deriv of flatness, mean of pitch, pitch confidence, 40 melbands (for spectral compensation), 13 mfccs + stats
setttings.comment: using 8d of descriptors for nearest neighbor matching, and then loudness and 40 melbands for loudness/spectral compensation and 13 mfccs + stats for classificaiton/regression. also saves the fits for normalization and standardization
